ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "org" TEXT /* Organization or user owning the project */,
  "repo" TEXT /* Repository name of the project */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., Linux, Kubernetes, React) */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the project is released */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars the project has received */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks the project has */,
  "watchers" INTEGER /* Number of watchers the project has */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the project is hosted */,
  "main_language" TEXT /* Primary programming language used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_type FOREIGN KEY ("project_type") REFERENCES project_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_org FOREIGN KEY ("org") REFERENCES organizations ("org_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the organization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the organization's details were last updated */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the contributor is working on */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contributor was added to the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contributor's details were last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor (e.g., maintainer, contributor, collaborator) */,
  "commits" INTEGER /* Number of commits made by the contributor */,
  "issues_created" INTEGER /* Number of issues created by the contributor */,
  "pull_requests_created" INTEGER /* Number of pull requests created by the contributor */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity by the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the commit was made to */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date the commit was made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message accompanying the commit */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash of the commit */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch where the commit was made */,
  "files_changed" INTEGER /* Number of files changed in the commit */,
  "lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the commit */,
  "lines_removed" INTEGER /* Number of lines removed in the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue was reported for */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who created the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels associated with the issue */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the issue */,
  "assigned_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor to whom the issue is assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the pull request was made to */,
  "pr_date" TEXT /* Date the pull request was made */,
  "pr_message" TEXT /* Message accompanying the pull request */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who created the pull request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pull request (e.g., open, closed, merged) */,
  "branch_from" TEXT /* Source branch of the pull request */,
  "branch_to" TEXT /* Target branch of the pull request */,
  "commits_count" INTEGER /* Number of commits in the pull request */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the pull request */,
  "reviewers" TEXT /* IDs of the reviewers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment was made on */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., issue, pull request, commit) */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the activity occurred on */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., commit, issue, pull request) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project type's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's details were last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
